testcase.name: test_csrf_token_endpoint_returns_token
testcase.failure: tests/test_p0_p3_features.py:28: in test_csrf_token_endpoint_returns_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 503: {"error": "Backend starting, please retry"} E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_malformed_json_returns_400_not_500
testcase.failure: tests/test_p0_p3_features.py:50: in test_malformed_json_returns_400_not_500 assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for malformed JSON, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for malformed JSON, got 503: {"error": "Backend starting, please retry"} E assert 503 == 400 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for malformed JSON on /api/user/forgot-password, got 503 assert 503 == 400 + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code
